testcase.name: test_client_price_is_ignored_server_uses_db_price
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inquiries_price_security.py:56: in test_client_price_is_ignored_server_uses_db_price assert r.status_code == 200, f"Got {r.status_code}: {r.text[:400]}" E AssertionError: Got 429: {"detail":"Too many requests, please slow down."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_multiple_items_total_is_sum_of_server_prices
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inquiries_price_security.py:84: in test_multiple_items_total_is_sum_of_server_prices assert resp.status_code == 200, resp.text[:400] E AssertionError: {"detail":"Too many requests, please slow down."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
